allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Phase 1: foundation — Docker stack, Clean Architecture skeleton, DI, event bus, health checks *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Phase 3: strategy plugin system + vectorbt backtesting engine *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add broker settings portal: configure OANDA credentials from the UI *)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(d['symbol'], d['timeframe'], d['status'], d['candle_count'], d['source']\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([f\\"{d['symbol']} {d['timeframe']} {d['status']} {d['candle_count']:,}\\" for d in rows if d['symbol']=='EURUSD' and d['timeframe']=='H1']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(s['status'], s['trials_completed'], '/', s['n_trials'], 'best:', s['best_score']\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'Phase 4: massive optimization — Optuna + configurable objective + Redis workers *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Phase 5: robust validation — walk-forward, Monte Carlo, stress testing *)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rl:', r['status'], r['id']\)")

Bash(git commit -m 'Auto-trader: act on real candle-close, not a UTC clock bucket *)

Bash(docker --context desktop-linux exec quantlab-postgres-1 psql -U quantlab -d quantlab -t -c "SELECT \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM auto_traders\) AS autotraders, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM broker_settings\) AS brokers, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM users\) AS users, \(SELECT count\(*\) FROM optimization_studies\) AS studies;")
Bash(docker --context desktop-linux run --rm -v quantlab_marketdata:/v alpine du -sh /v)
Bash(docker --context desktop-linux exec quantlab-postgres-1 psql -U quantlab -d quantlab -t -c "SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version;")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('API:', d['status'], '| comps:', {k:v['status'] for k,v in d['components'].items\(\)}\)")
Bash(docker --context desktop-linux stop quantlab-api-1 quantlab-worker-1 quantlab-autotrader-1 quantlab-frontend-1 quantlab-postgres-1 quantlab-redis-1)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\)\); print\('swing_strength=%s sl_atr=%.3f tp_atr=%.3f atr_period=%s' % \(d.get\('swing_strength'\), d.get\('sl_atr',0\), d.get\('tp_atr',0\), d.get\('atr_period'\)\)\)")
